title: Release 4.8.1 is missing the .pkg installers for MacOS
body:
Release 4.8.1 is missing the .pkg installers for MacOS

The latest release of Podman 4.8.1 doesn't ship the .pkg installers for MacOS.
This has happened multiple times previously also.

Can we automate this process so that it is taken care whenever a new build is released.

Thanks in advance.

See Previous Issues:
https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/18726
https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/20287

comments.body:
The process is automated, it just doesn't help if the automation is failing: https://github.com/containers/podman/actions/runs/7100276693/job/19326018871

@lsm5 @ashley-cui @baude Who has access to the credentials and can fix this?

The .pkg files are now available as part of the release assets. 
Closing this issue.

Thanks all.
